enrichment.summary: Kyle films a late-night vlog after a long workday near the Flatirons, recapping his bicycle commute, manual labor, and evening of remote work. He shares thoughts on daily vlogging while high, his breakfast recipe, renting movies he never watches, and plans to add topic labels to future vlog titles.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: Being high makes it harder to remember what to say; may need to do sober recordings in the morning
Really enjoying it as a story of events with religious context; plans to do a dedicated video about it
Wants to add specific topic labels to titles to motivate covering more subjects
Enthusiastic about his oatmeal, canned fruit, and protein powder combo as a calorie-efficient meal
